metadata.name: vaultrise
metadata.description: Vaultrise lending protocol — borrow USDC against graduated PumpSwap tokens

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint (its token program is passed as `token_program`).

accounts.name: fee_recipient
docs: USDC token account that receives protocol fees.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: The token program that owns the USDC mint (SPL Token on mainnet).

accounts.name: liquidator_registry
docs: Optional: a priority-liquidator registration grants a higher bonus.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program owning USDC/gUSDC (SPL Token on mainnet).

accounts.name: collateral_token_program
docs: Token program owning the collateral mint (Token-2022 for pump.fun tokens).

accounts.name: vrise_token_program
docs: Token program owning $VRISE (only needed with the boost).

instructions.name: set_vrise_mint
docs: Set the $VRISE mint after the token launches (enables burn/boost ops).

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the protocol authority

errors.name: UnauthorizedOracleUpdater
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the oracle updater

errors.name: TokenDisabled
errors.msg: Collateral token is not enabled

errors.name: TokenLpBlocked
errors.msg: Collateral token is blocked due to LP concentration risk

errors.name: StaleOraclePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is stale

errors.name: InvalidOraclePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is zero or uninitialized

errors.name: LoanBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Loan amount is below the protocol minimum

errors.name: LoanAboveMaximum
errors.msg: Loan amount exceeds the protocol maximum

errors.name: ExceedsMaxLtv
errors.msg: Requested borrow exceeds the maximum allowed by LTV

errors.name: PositionAlreadyOpen
errors.msg: Position already has an open loan

errors.name: NoOutstandingDebt
errors.msg: Position has no outstanding debt

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Not enough available liquidity in the lending pool

errors.name: PositionHealthy
errors.msg: Health Factor is at or above 1.0; position is not liquidatable

errors.name: ShieldGraceActive
errors.msg: Liquidation shield grace period is active

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Repay amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: Provided mint does not match the configured mint

errors.name: VriseNotSet
errors.msg: The $VRISE mint has not been set yet (admin must call set_vrise_mint)

errors.name: BoostStillActive
errors.msg: LTV boost is still active

errors.name: CollateralRemaining
errors.msg: Collateral remaining in escrow; cannot close position

types.name: BurnEvent
docs: Emitted on every $VRISE burn, regardless of which operation triggered it.
`operation` values: 0=open,1=ltv_boost,2=shield,3=repay_discount,4=priority_liquidator,5=whitelist_vote.

types.name: LiquidatorRegistry
docs: Registered "priority" liquidator. PDA seeds: [b"liquidator", liquidator].

types.name: OraclePrice
docs: Per-collateral-mint price feed. PDA seeds: [b"oracle", mint].

fields.name: price
docs: USDC (6 decimals) per 1 whole collateral token.

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Global singleton. Holds authorities, configured mints, and protocol-wide flags.
PDA seeds: [b"config"].

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority allowed to run admin instructions (add tokens, pause, etc.).

fields.name: oracle_updater
docs: Trusted signer allowed to push oracle price updates.

fields.name: fee_recipient
docs: Receives the protocol fee charged at borrow time.

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint used for lending/borrowing.

fields.name: vrise_mint
docs: The $VRISE mint burned by boost operations.

fields.name: vrise_decimals
docs: Decimals of the $VRISE mint (used to scale whole-token burn amounts).

fields.name: paused
docs: When true, state-changing user instructions are blocked.

fields.name: total_vrise_burned
docs: Lifetime $VRISE burned (raw base units), for the public burn tracker.

types.name: ReservePool
docs: The single USDC lending reserve. PDA seeds: [b"reserve"].

fields.name: usdc_vault
docs: Token account holding lender USDC liquidity (authority = config PDA).

fields.name: insurance_vault
docs: Token account holding the insurance fund in USDC (authority = config PDA).

fields.name: gusdc_mint
docs: gUSDC receipt mint (mint authority = config PDA).

fields.name: total_debt_scaled
docs: Sum of all positions' normalized debt (WAD-scaled). Current total debt =
total_debt_scaled * cumulative_borrow_index / WAD.

fields.name: cumulative_borrow_index
docs: Cumulative borrow index (WAD). Starts at WAD (== 1.0) and only grows.

fields.name: last_accrued_ts
docs: Unix timestamp of the last interest accrual.

fields.name: insurance_fund
docs: Insurance fund balance mirror (USDC base units).

fields.name: total_loans_opened
docs: Lifetime number of loans opened.

fields.name: total_liquidations
docs: Lifetime number of liquidations.

types.name: TokenConfig
docs: Per-collateral-mint configuration. PDA seeds: [b"token", mint].

fields.name: lp_blocked
docs: Set by the off-chain LP-concentration checker when top-3 holders > 60%.

fields.name: pumpswap_pool
docs: The PumpSwap pool address backing this token's price (reference only).

types.name: UserPosition
docs: A borrower's position for a single collateral mint.
PDA seeds: [b"position", borrower, collateral_mint].

fields.name: collateral_amount
docs: Collateral locked in the escrow token account (base units).

fields.name: debt_scaled
docs: Normalized debt (WAD). Current debt = debt_scaled * index / WAD.

fields.name: principal
docs: Outstanding principal (USDC base units), excludes accrued interest.

fields.name: max_ltv_bps
docs: The max LTV granted to this position (2000 standard, 2500 with open-boost).

fields.name: ltv_boost_expiry
docs: Expiry of a temporary LTV boost (0 = none).

fields.name: shield_expiry
docs: Expiry of the liquidation-shield subscription (0 = none).

fields.name: grace_started_at
docs: When the shield grace period was first tripped by a liquidation attempt
(0 = not tripped). Liquidation is allowed once SHIELD_GRACE_SECS elapse.
